title: Pinwheel launches a retro-inspired landline phone for kids
snippet: Kid-friendly tech company Pinwheel announced the launch of a new landline phone designed to let children stay connected without the distractions of a smartphone.

title: Already rich, already successful, why the last wave of tech winners is grinding again
snippet: They're rolling up their sleeves again, seemingly out of fear of missing AI's defining moment and, presumably, the irresistible allure of making even more money -- potentially a lot more.
